description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular form factor, featuring a large glass touchscreen display on the front. The front face displays the Windows operating system interface, with visible icons, time, and notification bar, and the 'Microsoft' brand name above the screen. The back is matte black with a prominent circular camera module near the top center, accompanied by a flash and a small speaker grille. The sides are slim and house several physical buttons, likely for power and volume control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and glass, with metallic accents around the camera. Its overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, a circular rear camera module, and side buttons, displaying the Windows interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass touchscreen with the Windows interface, 'Microsoft' branding, and a black bezel.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the placement of physical buttons along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the matte black finish, circular camera module with metallic ring, flash, and speaker grille.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the device's thinness and absence of buttons on this edge.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Microsoft' brand name is visible above the screen on the front face, rendered in small, light-colored text.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays the Windows operating system interface, including a blue Windows wallpaper, time (9:50), notification bar, and several app icons.
attribute_camera_placement: A single, large circular camera module is centered near the top of the back, accompanied by a flash to its left and a small speaker grille to its right.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible on the right edge: two elongated buttons likely for volume control and a smaller button, probably the power button.
